creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Fix minor issue with pkg-plist
- No PORTREVISION bump since it doesn't change final package

Note:
You don't need to list the subdirectories in pkg-plist (except for @dirrm(try))
Logs:
Before patch (look at bottom)
<http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/logs/8-scheidell_AMD64/userspace-rcu-0.6.4.log>

After patch:

<http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/index.php?action=display_markup_log&build=8-scheidell_AMD64&id=1399#579>

Fix: 

______________________________________________________________________

______________________________________________________________________--6YNpHXwNKtl8DZz5dURga7Tystvuogug159SYsj9MTTMUjcU

Index: pkg-plist
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/sysutils/userspace-rcu/pkg-plist,v
retrieving revision 1.1
diff -u -r1.1 pkg-plist
--- pkg-plist	6 Mar 2012 20:35:34 -0000	1.1
+++ pkg-plist	17 Mar 2012 12:57:50 -0000
@@ -1,9 +1,6 @@
-include/urcu
 include/urcu/urcu_ref.h
 include/urcu/config.h
-include/urcu/uatomic
 include/urcu/uatomic/generic.h
-include/urcu/static
 include/urcu/static/urcu-bp.h
 include/urcu/static/rculfqueue.h
 include/urcu/static/urcu.h
@@ -16,7 +13,6 @@
 include/urcu/system.h
 include/urcu/ref.h
 include/urcu/wfqueue.h
-include/urcu/arch
 include/urcu/arch/generic.h
 include/urcu/cds.h
 include/urcu/wfstack.h
@@ -30,7 +26,6 @@
 include/urcu/uatomic.h
 include/urcu/rculfqueue.h
 include/urcu/rculist.h
-include/urcu/map
 include/urcu/map/urcu-qsbr.h
 include/urcu/map/urcu.h
 include/urcu/map/urcu-bp.h
